result.reason: Implement keyboard navigation for filtered connection results in the connection tree to improve user experience.
result.approach: Modify ConnectionTree.cs to handle Up/Down arrow key presses when a filter is active, and update the selection based on the filtered results provided by ConnectionTreeSearchTextFilter.cs.
